decisions.title: Exclusive accordion via expandedEmail
decisions.summary: Lift @State var expandedEmail: String? to AccountList, replacing per-row @State isExpanded. DisclosureGroup retained with Binding adapter.

decisions.title: 48pt compact collapsed rows
decisions.summary: Reduce AccountHeader from 56pt to 48pt. Hide org name in collapsed state for density.

decisions.title: 48pt compressed footer (multi-account only)
decisions.summary: Gear icon for secondary actions (Check for Updates, Launch at Login). Single-account retains full footer.

decisions.title: Bottleneck computed tuple on UsageData
decisions.summary: Centralize highestUtilization logic as var bottleneck: (percentage: Int, category: String) on UsageData.

decisions.title: 6-file decomposition
decisions.summary: Extract 718-line UsageView.swift into 6 focused files under 150 lines each.

decisions.title: colorForPercentage deduplication
decisions.summary: Extract duplicated function (lines 264 and 685) to shared utility.
